# revolut_plan_variation (Resource)

A pricing variation (per-currency / per-interval variant) of a Revolut subscription plan. Variations have NO independent API: they are created inline with the plan (POST /subscription-plans) and are immutable. This resource is a read-through projection over the parent plan — it never mutates the variation. Every attribute forces replacement, and `terraform destroy` only removes it from state (the variation remains ORPHANED in Revolut). The computed `id` is usable as a reference for runtime create-subscription calls.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `plan_id` (String) UUID of the parent plan. Immutable.

### Optional

- `id` (String) Server-assigned variation UUID. When set in config it selects a specific variation inside the parent plan; when omitted, the plan's single variation is adopted. Immutable.

### Read-Only

- `phases` (Attributes List) Ordered billing phases of this variation. Server-assigned; immutable. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases))
- `trial_duration` (String) ISO-8601 trial duration for this variation (e.g. P14D). Server-assigned; immutable.

<a id="nestedatt--phases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases`

Read-Only:

- `amount` (Number) Phase amount in minor units.
- `currency` (String) ISO-4217 currency code.
- `cycle_count` (Number) Number of cycles before advancing; null = open-ended.
- `cycle_duration` (String) ISO-8601 billing cycle duration (e.g. P1M).
- `id` (String) Server-assigned phase UUID.
- `ordinal` (Number) Phase order (0-based).
- `subscription_items` (Attributes List) Line items billed in this phase. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--phases--subscription_items))

<a id="nestedatt--phases--subscription_items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `phases.subscription_items`

Read-Only:

- `amount` (Number) Item amount in minor units.
- `quantity` (Number) Item quantity.
- `type` (String) Item type (flat | usage).
